detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.20 (FalconFarmer.sol#1)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in FalconFarmer.getFreeFalcon() (FalconFarmer.sol#185-199):
	External calls:
	- ceoAddress.transfer(msg.value) (FalconFarmer.sol#191)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- hatcheryFalcon[msg.sender] = STARTING_FALCON (FalconFarmer.sol#197)
	- lastHatch[msg.sender] = now (FalconFarmer.sol#195)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [FalconFarmer.getFreeFalcon()](FalconFarmer.sol#L185-L199):
	External calls:
	- [ceoAddress.transfer(msg.value)](FalconFarmer.sol#L191)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [hatcheryFalcon[msg.sender] = STARTING_FALCON](FalconFarmer.sol#L197)
	- [lastHatch[msg.sender] = now](FalconFarmer.sol#L195)
